headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Federal Realty Investment, Raises Price Target to $112
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Ki Bin Kim   maintains Federal Realty Investment (NYSE:FRT) with a Hold and raises the price target from $111 to $112.
